

Neg Binoma, $E(y) = \mu$, $\theta$ is size, $1/\sqrt(\theta)$ is sd of Gamma random effect

$$
\begin{aligned}
f(y;\mu,\theta) =  & \log\Gamma(y + r) - \log\Gamma(r) - \log\Gamma(y + 1) 
	+ r \log(\frac{r}{r + \mu})
	+ y \log(\frac{\mu}{r + \mu}) \\
	= &  \log\Gamma(y + r) - \log\Gamma(r) - \log\Gamma(y + 1)  + r \log r - r \log(r + \mu) + y \log(\mu) - y\log(r + \mu)
\end{aligned}
$$

```{r theData}
Nobs = 100000;Nrandom1=100;Nrandom2=200

set.seed(0)
X = Matrix::Matrix(cbind(1, rbinom(Nobs,1, prob= 0.5)))
AmatList = list(
	Matrix::sparseMatrix(
		i = 1:Nobs,
		j= sample(Nrandom1, Nobs, replace=TRUE)
	),
	Matrix::sparseMatrix(
		i = 1:Nobs,
		j= sample(Nrandom2, Nobs, replace=TRUE)
	)
)
Amat = do.call(cbind, AmatList)
beta = rep(1, ncol(X))
thetaOrig = 0.1;theta = log(thetaOrig)
gamma = rnorm(ncol(Amat), sd=thetaOrig)
eta = as.vector(X %*% beta + Amat %*% gamma)
etaT = exp(eta)
Z = rgamma(length(etaT), 0.1^(-2), 0.1^(-2))
c(mean(Z), sd(Z))
y = rpois(length(etaT), etaT*Z)


NperEffect = unlist(lapply(AmatList, ncol))   
map = rep(seq(0, len=length(NperEffect)), NperEffect)

data = list(y = y, 
	ATp = as(Matrix::t(Amat), 'dMatrix'),
	XTp = as(Matrix::t(X), 'CsparseMatrix'),
	map = map, 
	Qdiag = rep(1, ncol(Amat)))

Ngroups = ceiling(Nobs/10)
data$groups = adlaplace::adFun_groups(Ngroups, data$ATp)


config1 = list(beta = rep(0, nrow(data$XTp)), 
	theta = c(rep(-1, length(NperEffect)), -1), 
	transform_theta=TRUE, start_gamma = rep(0, nrow(data$ATp)),
	num_threads=parallel::detectCores(),
	verbose=TRUE)	
```







```{r getAdstuff}
adFun1 = adlaplace::getAdFun(data, config1)
sparsity_list = adlaplace::group_sparsity(adFun1, config1, verbose=TRUE)
config = modifyList(config1, sparsity_list)
system.time(res2 <- adlaplace::inner_opt(
	config$start_gamma, data=data, config=config,
	control = list(report.level=4, report.freq=1)))
unlist(res2[c('minusLogLik', 'halfLogDet','fval')]	)
quantile(res2$gradient)
```



```{r eval}
# get adFun again, with sparsity
adFun = adlaplace::getAdFun(data, config)
adlaplace::jointLogDens(config$start_gamma, adFun, config)
x = adlaplace::grad(config$start_gamma, adFun, config)
x2 = adlaplace::hessian(config$start_gamma, adFun, config)

forNumDeriv = function(xx, ...) {
	adlaplace::jointLogDens(c(xx, config$start_gamma[-(1:length(xx))]), ...)
}
x2 = numDeriv::grad(forNumDeriv, config$start_gamma[1:20], adPack = adFun, config=config)
plot(x2, x[1:length(x2)])
```

```{r opt}
system.time(
	res1 <- trustOptim::trust.optim(
	config$start_gamma,
	adlaplace::jointLogDens,
	adlaplace::grad,
	adlaplace::hessian,
	method='Sparse',
	control = list(report.level=4, report.freq=1),
	adPack = adlaplace::getAdFun(data, config), config=config
	))
```


to do: 


- full derivs
- third, logLik.R
- outer opt, 
- link from hpolcc
